title: susus gigantus
description: Turns the iron golem into an extreme muscular and buff amongus
body:
REQUIRES OPTIFINE


﻿This pack turns the iron golem into an EXTREMELY BUFF AMONGUS!!!
Why did i make this? Idk. Will this pack change your life? Probably not ._.
BUT THERE IS A BUFF AMOGUS SO WHY WOULD ANYONE HATE THIS OMGMGDIUOADHWIAUD



The more time I spent on the internet the more braincells I lose daily lol
